title: husk loot overhaul
description: It simply means that instead of copying the zombie loot table, the husk has its own loot table
body:
[![Kinetic Hosting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1af71189dede4258766a75b4957acefce1910966.webp)](https://billing.kinetichosting.com/aff.php?aff=1406)

It simply means that instead of copying the zombie loot table, the husk has its own loot table



Rottem flesh--->leather

iron ingot--->gold ingot

carrot-->beetroot seeds

potato--->sugar cane
